name: ᛞ Dagaz
flowText: Dagaz is the turning of the sky—the hinge where night exhales and the day inhales. It snaps the polarity, revealing the path in a single clean flash: insight made visible, doubt burned off like mist. Stand at this doorway and let the inner sun crest the horizon; act as soon as the light arrives.

overview.value: XVII The Star · XIX The Sun

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ☉ Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is the eternal lamp — source of clarity, fire of spirit, nobility of heart.

related.name: XIX. The Sun
related.teaser: The Sun is pure illumination — radiant joy and vital force shining clarity into all things.

related.name: Ouranos
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: 👑 Crown (Sahasrara)
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: Metatron
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: Sophia
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: Apollo
related.teaser: Apollo is a crown that unifies — Sun disk; under Sun; in Leo; with XIX The Sun.

related.name: XIV. Temperance
related.teaser: Temperance is the angel of alchemy, pouring essence from one vessel into another, uniting opposites.

related.name: y
related.teaser: Seed of spirit, Potential of self
